title: AgIS Agent Status Document
description: EXPERIMENTAL. Defines the structure of an AgIS Agent Status Document. The status value drives the policy decision: active=allow, revoked/suspended/compromised=deny, unknown/deprecated=review. The optional signature field carries an EdDSA/JWS signature over the canonicalized document. Schema is aligned with AgIS SDK v0.3.0-alpha.3.

agent_id.description: Agent identifier that this status document applies to. Must match the agent_id in the corresponding Agent Card.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the agent. Policy decisions: active→allow, revoked/suspended/compromised→deny, unknown/deprecated→review.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason or machine-readable code explaining the status.

revoked_at.description: Required when status=revoked. ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the agent was revoked.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this status document was last updated.

cache.description: Optional cache control hints for consumers of this status document.

ttl_seconds.description: Suggested TTL in seconds for caching this status document.

signature.description: Optional EdDSA/JWS signature over the JCS-canonicalized status document (excluding this field). When present, verifiers SHOULD verify it before trusting the status value.

type.description: Signature envelope type. Must be "jws" or "JWS".

key_id.description: Identifier of the signing key, matching the kid in the JWS protected header.
